title: Mustardy Crispy Croatian Cabbage Pierogi
description: A traditional Croatian dish featuring crispy cabbage pierogi topped with a tangy mustard glaze and coconut cream. This recipe is vegan-friendly and perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, warm water, and coconut oil to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it's smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small balls and roll out each one into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of shredded cabbage in the center of each circle and fold the dough over to form a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
Heat a large skillet with a couple of tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat and fry the pierogi until golden brown on both sides.
Meanwhile, whisk together the mustard powder, apple cider vinegar, maple syrup, and a pinch of salt and pepper in a small bowl.
Add the whisked glaze to the fried pierogi and toss to coat.
Top with a dollop of coconut cream and sprinkle with nutritional yeast.
This recipe makes 12-15 pierogi, depending on the size of the dough circles.
You can also make the pierogi ahead of time and freeze them for later use.
